insight: Paper kick "out of order confirmation packet (-N != -N-1)" during Boss's Teleport/Confuse skills is an anticheat conflict (e.g. Vulcan), not a Boss bug. Boss uses standard Bukkit `Entity#teleport(Location)` with cause `PLUGIN`; the anticheat issues its own corrective teleport in the same tick, interleaving Paper's teleport ids. Fix must come from the anticheat side (grace window on `PlayerTeleportEvent` with cause == PLUGIN). Workaround: disable the Teleport skill.
